notes: Production deploy verified via Vercel deployment dpl_EggevnrYHhWKcW5ak4VeSeAHqMAw for commit a52918f6f946e7ed6ea5fb647a4b058808a2873d.
Dashboard sidebar fresh streaming response still renders an analysis badge that expands to only data source and engine.
A complex prompt did enter Cloud Run AI Engine processing flow after deployment, confirming the intended backend route for verification.
The Cloud Run verification prompt then hit a production rate limit twice, preventing end-to-end confirmation of the new metadata on the job-queue path.
